headline: Is Otis Worldwide Corporation (OTIS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is OTIS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Otis Worldwide Corporation on Quality At A Fair Price’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on OTIS. Otis Worldwide Corporation’s share was trading at $69.63 as of June 8th. OTIS’s trailing and forward P/E were 18.58 and 16.64 respectively […]
